data.description:
## What
Remove the TICKET_CMD validate injection seam (dead bash-era test seam; never set in production; validate reads in-process). Slice of EV-2 / 77aa.

## Scope / Deliverables
- src/rebar/_engine_support/validate.py: _raw_tickets always reads in-process (reads.ensure_fresh + reads.list_states); drop the os.environ.get("TICKET_CMD") subprocess branch; replace the two 'os.environ.get("TICKET_CMD") or _default_ticket_cmd()' with _default_ticket_cmd(); update the _FETCHING message wording.
- Rewrite tests/interfaces/queries/test_validate_compute.py to materialize real in-process ticket stores from the fixture dicts (create_ticket/link/transition) instead of injecting a mock 'ticket' script via TICKET_CMD; preserve the health-score tier assertions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No TICKET_CMD read remains in src; validate always reads in-process
- [ ] test_validate_compute materializes real stores (no TICKET_CMD / mock script); same tier/score assertions hold
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green
data.title: EV-2b: remove TICKET_CMD validate injection seam
